settings.colorThemeDescription: Sets the color mode for the application to light or dark mode
settings.numberOfBurstDescription: Sets the number of unique damage burst to view in the analytics page.
settings.numberOfLargestHitsDescription: Sets the number of unique single largest damage instances to view in the analytics page.
settings.pollingRateDescription: Sets the interval for receving data while recording.
settings.selectAdapterDescription: Sets the adapter for the parser to use.
settings.skillUsageTopNDescription: Sets the default number of skills shown in the skill usage ratio chart before grouping the rest as Other.
settings.topEnemyCountDescription: Sets the default X used by the Analytics Top X Targets filter. Targets are ranked by total damage dealt within the selected time range.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.enemyFilterDescription: Filters damage analytics to targets ranked by total damage dealt within the selected time range.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.name: Name
recordings.trimDescription: Trimmed recordings are viewable as new entries in recordings table
